input.headline: Gambling probes halt lower leagues and suspend hundreds of players, but many say they are scapegoats

raw.headline: Gambling probes halt lower leagues and suspend hundreds of players, but many say they are scapegoats

winner: Why did the hundreds of suspended soccer players refuse to play hide and seek? Because they were convinced they were always the scapegoats, even when it came to being sought!

candidates.text: Why did the hundreds of suspended soccer players refuse to play hide and seek? Because they were convinced they were always the scapegoats, even when it came to being sought!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a good pun on 'scapegoats' and 'hide and seek,' but the connection to the headline could be tighter for maximum surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the soccer players bring a scapegoat to the casino? Because they heard it's great for lower leagues!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke connects the headline elements with a pun on 'lower leagues,' but the setup is slightly forced and the humor is mild."}

candidates.text: Why don't lower league soccer players ever get caught playing cards? Because whenever they're under investigation, they claim they're just scapegoats!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses wordplay on 'scapegoats,' but it lacks specificity and feels a bit forced. The connection between playing cards and being under investigation isn't clearly established, reducing its surprise and funniness."}

candidates.text: Why did the football players protest after being suspended from the lower leagues? They claimed they were just playing a game of high stakes scapegoat!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'high stakes scapegoat,' but it's a bit forced and lacks natural flow. It meets some constraints but could be more concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: The lower leagues were suspended, but I assure you, these players weren't benchwarmers. They just needed a lucky roll of the dice.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'benchwarmers' and 'roll of the dice,' but it's a bit forced and lacks the specificity and surprise that would make it stand out in a humor competition."}
